title: GEMSTONE Research Data: PCR Images and Protocols
author: Turan, Talat Taygun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The images and protocols in this file represent the routine PCR experiments conducted in the GEMSTONE Project to determine the genotypes of the transgenic animals used throughout the project.
steps_raw: The images and protocols in this file represent the routine PCR experiments conducted in the GEMSTONE Project to determine the genotypes of the transgenic animals used throughout the project.
